subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I beseech Thee by Thy Most Great Name. Glorified art Thou, O my God! I beseech Thee by Thy Most Ancient Name. Glorified art Thou, O my God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم اسئلک باسمک الاعظم سبحانک اللهم اسئلک باسمک الاقدم سبحانک اللهم
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @prayer for service
